problem_statement: The GovernedPlanningProfile admission adapter needs a local no-effect dossier that runs representative gateway planning classes through the read-only projection path before any runtime promotion or operator shadow-pilot claim.
success_criteria: a deterministic local reporter compiles, simulates, and projects representative plan classes into GovernedPlanningProfile admission reports
the dossier schema denies execution, dispatch, runtime replanning, terminal closure, and success claims
the dossier covers uncompiled conversation, read-only search, compound search-to-notification, high-risk payment, and open-world-contradiction search scenarios
the dossier validates every nested admission report against the existing admission report schema
focused tests cover coverage completeness, schema compatibility, distinct blocker shapes, and authority-drift rejection
non_goals: do not add a router, worker, service, scheduler, connector, or execution path
do not promote the planning profile into runtime authority
do not collect operator approval, run live shadow pilots, or claim terminal closure
do not replace the single-report admission adapter
constraints: the reporter is deterministic, local, read-only, and reversible
all reports remain AwaitingEvidence until operator shadow-pilot and promotion approval evidence exists
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved because the reporter hashes scenario messages and does not normalize or decompose text
evidence_required: SDLC design and security review artifacts
